title: Simple Database Store
statement:
Implement a simple database store using a mock array to store and retrieve books. The store should have the following endpoints:

   - **GET /api/books**: Retrieve all books in the store
   - **POST /api/books**: Create a new book in the store
   - **GET /api/books/:id**: Retrieve a book by its ID

   Your implementation should store the data in memory and use the Express framework to handle HTTP requests.

   **Note:** You can assume that the request body for POST requests will always be in JSON format.

   **Constraint 1:** Must use only the in-memory array or mock database provided
   **Constraint 2:** Must handle errors and edge cases correctly

   You will be tested on the correctness and behavior of your implementation. Good luck!
constraints: Must use only the in-memory array or mock database provided
Must handle errors and edge cases correctly

endpoints.description: Retrieve all books in the store
Create a new book in the store
Retrieve a book by its ID
